items.name: Settler Intelligence Briefing
items.description:
Hostile rogue drones hunt and scavenge every system in this constellation we call Phoenix. They grow stronger as you move away from Angelice. They are reported more commonly near planets but sightings occur almost anywhere.

Large asteroid clusters have been cataloged in each system. In some, a large rogue drone structure appears to be devouring the raw ore and so the Settlers have begun calling the clusters 'Moon Eater'. Another location with dense resources has been found, but exploration attempts have failed due to an infested Abaddon who sits on watch. Ophidia Operations, based in Serpentis, are working on a technology to provide concealment.

Your starter pack contains a blueprint we believe will provide access to the system Askur, which is currently locked by sophisticated encryption. We don't know what Askur has in store.

Settler security forces have not yet been established, guard yourself. However, should your ship be destroyed, starter packs can be purchased from the market here in Angelice.

items.name: Crude Extractor
items.description: Module used in the extraction of crude matter required for all types of fuel by drawing exotic material through a crude rift.

items.name: Lens 3X
items.description: For use with Crude Extractors only.

items.name: Rough Old Crude Matter
items.description:
Braids of serenity and power entwine and disperse across the surface. Within, they dance as if begging to be set free. From this rhythm, the dreams of those long passed and those newly awoken may spring forth.

A quiet fragility eminates from the matter’s movements, the ethereal beauty of transience. Practicality has no need of such things.

items.name: Embark
items.description: Extra small hydrogen engine. Runs exclusively on hydrogen fuel.

items.name: Feldspar Crystals
items.description: Calcium-sodium aluminosilicate feldspar crystals from basaltic crust of differentiated asteroids. Feldspar Crystals are commonly found in Char asteroids.

items.name: Nickel-Iron Veins
items.description:
Nickel-bearing alloys commonly intermixed with iron in metallic asteroids. 

Nickel-Iron Veins is commonly refined from Platinum-Palladium Matrix.

items.name: Silicon Dust
items.description:
Abundant non-metal hosted in silicate minerals throughout asteroids. 

Silicon Dust is commonly refined from Silica Grains.

items.name: Tholin Aggregates
items.description:
Prebiotic tar-like organics produced by long-term radiation chemistry. 

Tholin Aggregates is commonly refined from Hydrocarbon Residue.

items.name: Platinum-Group Veins
items.description:
Rare platinum-group metals concentrated in differentiated asteroid cores. 

Platinum-Group Veins is commonly refined from Platinum-Palladium Matrix.

items.name: Platinum-Palladium Matrix
items.description: Platinum and palladium concentrated in nickel-rich metallic grains from intermediate core zones. Forms during slow cooling of differentiated asteroid cores. Platinum-Palladium Matrix is commonly found in Slag asteroids.

items.name: Hydrated Sulfide Matrix
items.description: Water-bearing sulfide-rich material common in carbonaceous chondrites. Represents aqueous alteration of metal sulfides in the early solar system. Hydrated Sulfide Matrix is commonly found in Comet asteroids.

items.name: Unstable Fuel
items.description: Long abandoned and left to the mercy of the Static Shear, little energy or even structure remains. This lingering dross provides barely enough of a spark to power a vessel. Even the best refinery processes cannot prevent the decay of time from claiming their product.

items.name: Small Cutting Laser
items.description: A direct energy tool useful for breaking apart solid matter. Like many of its forebearers, it can serve needs beyond its intended purpose. Adaptation is necessary for survival.

items.name: Heavy Storage
items.description: A programmable storage unit.

items.name: Water Ice
items.description:
Essential volatile preserved in cold outer-belt environments. 

Hydrated Sulfide Matrix and Methane Ice Shards are common sources of Water Ice.

items.name: Iridosmine Nodules
items.description: Dense iridium-osmium-ruthenium alloy nodules from the deepest, hottest core regions. Among the most refractory materials in the solar system. Iridosmine Nodules are commonly found in Ingot asteroids.

items.name: Rough Young Crude Matter
items.description:
Currents of energy flicker almost playfully just beneath the surface. Deeper, the flows meld, forming a sea of emotion. The hue surrounding the matter changes with these internal tides, reflecting whichever passion dominates in the moment.

It is this mercurial nature which entices, which promises the ability to shape the future. So sweet is the call that danger, no matter how apparent, is easily ignored.

items.name: Methane Ice Shards
items.description: Pure methane ice preserved at cryogenic temperatures in outer asteroid belt regions. Methane Ice Shards are commonly found in Dewdrop asteroids.

items.name: Primitive Kerogen Matrix
items.description: Unaltered complex organic polymer preserved from early solar system formation, less processed than C-type kerogen. Primitive Kerogen Matrix is commonly found in Ember asteroids.

items.name: Aromatic Carbon Veins
items.description: Concentrated deposits of complex aromatic hydrocarbons formed through extended space weathering and radiation processing of organic ices. Aromatic Carbon Veins are commonly found in Glint asteroids.

items.name: Tholin Nodules
items.description: Prebiotic tar-like organics formed from radiation-driven chemistry. Tholin Nodules are commonly found in Soot asteroids.

items.name: Velocity CD81
items.description: Engine with high performance and high power requirments. Requires any kind of refined Crude fuel such as EU-40 to operate. Will not function using hydrogen fuel.

items.name: Velocity CD82
items.description: Engine with high performance and high power requirments. Requires any kind of refined Crude fuel such as EU-40 to operate. Will not function using hydrogen fuel.

items.name: Tempo CD43
items.description: Engine with a balance of performance and power requirements. Requires any kind of refined Crude fuel such as EU-40 to operate. Will not function using hydrogen fuel.

items.name: Celerity CD01
items.description: Engine with low performance but low power requirements. Requires any kind of refined Crude fuel such as EU-40 to operate. Will not function using hydrogen fuel.

items.name: Celerity CD02
items.description: Engine with low performance but low power requirements. Requires any kind of refined Crude fuel such as EU-40 to operate. Will not function using hydrogen fuel.

items.name: Celerity CD03
items.description: Engine with low performance but low power requirements. Requires any kind of refined Crude fuel such as EU-40 to operate. Will not function using hydrogen fuel.

items.name: Tempo CD42
items.description: Engine with a balance of performance and power requirements. Requires any kind of refined Crude fuel such as EU-40 to operate. Will not function using hydrogen fuel.

items.name: Tempo CD41
items.description: Engine with a balance of performance and power requirements. Requires any kind of refined Crude fuel such as EU-40 to operate. Will not function using hydrogen fuel.

items.name: Sojourn
items.description: Small hydrogen engine. Runs exclusively on hydrogen fuel.

items.name: LAI
items.description: An ultra-lightweight combat vessel designed to focus on striking fast. (placeholder)

items.name: LORHA
items.description: A small hauler designed to travel through combat zones. (placeholder)

items.name: MAUL
items.description: An assault cruiser platform. (Placeholder)

items.description: Momentarily reduces the maximum speed of a ship. ( copy )

items.name: Purified Moon Cutting Laser
items.description: The violence necessary to obtain such a trophy has reduced its functionality to a fraction of its potential. Yet, this laser remains operational in the face of all the Frontier’s hostilities, natural and computational alike. Fitting a feralized component, even one with its protocols exorcised and rebuilt, can be considered an act of hubris.

items.name: Medium Cutting Laser
items.description: A direct energy tool useful for breaking apart solid matter. Like many of its forebearers, it can serve needs beyond its intended purpose. Flexibility has served the denizens of the Frontier well.

items.name: Fossilized Exotronics
items.description: The Null and Static Shears wreak havoc on most traditional forms of computation, rendering them nigh unusable in the Frontier. Exotronic technology's extreme adaptability and durability thus effectively make it the only option for automation in this environment. Faint remnants of activity in this debris suggest the potential for reclamation. Within these dull impulses of fragmented information, a hint of familiarity calls out.

items.name: Printed Circuits
items.description: Cheap and modular basic electronics computing system.

items.name: Reinforced Alloys
items.description: A frontier standard alloy with versatile use cases.

items.name: Batched Reinforced Alloys
items.description: Durable structural component.

items.name: Packaged Reinforced Alloys
items.description: Large and durable structural component.

items.name: Carbon Weave
items.description: Strong material for products requiring lower weight.

items.name: Smart Turret
items.description: A structure with a turret slot which you can equip with any turret.

items.name: Ship chassis materials S ( copy )
items.description: ( copy )

items.name: Heavy Gate
items.description: Establish your own stargate by connecting two long distance Smart Gates together.

items.name: Mini Printer
items.description: Offers small scale industry services.

items.name: Heavy Printer
items.description: Industrial printer that handles materials in large quantities.

items.name: Refuge
items.description: Offers a respite after a long journey. Offers fitting services.

items.name: Field Refinery
items.description: Cheap and portable refinery that goes anywhere with you.

items.name: Field Printer
items.description: Portable printer that can produce basic survival items.

items.name: Field Storage
items.description: A small storage unit to store your resources.

items.name: Unrefined Radiantium
items.description: The glowing crystalline structure hums

items.name: Wend
items.description: A vessel able to complete basic tasks. Provided by Keep as a springboard for Project Awakening (placeholder)

items.name: Recurve
items.description: A small hard hitting combat vessel emphasizing firepower over hull strength. (Placeholder)

items.name: Reflex
items.description:
Created for efficient, long distance travel. Records suggest the structure of this vessel has been repurposed numerous times as automated processes sought to adapt to an increasingly hostile environment. 

As a result, the original intention behind this hull design has been lost to the millennia and data corruption has obscured even whether this design originates from a human or artificial mind. However, the data streams which led to this vessel's development have their origins in the K4T-Y region. (placeholder)

items.name: Reiver
items.description: A small, durable combat vessel. (Placeholder)

items.name: Refinery
items.description: A refinery capable of extracting main minerals from all ores.

items.name: Heavy Refinery
items.description: Industrial refinery capable of extracting most of the minerals from all ores.

items.name: Printer
items.description: A printer that handles materials in bulk.

items.name: Assembler
items.description: Assembles materials into end products like modules.

items.name: Mini Berth
items.description: Small shipyard for building shuttles and corvettes.

items.name: Berth
items.description: A shipyard for building frigates, destroyers and cruisers.

items.name: Heavy Berth
items.description: A large shipyard for building battleships and battlecruisers.

items.name: Mini Storage
items.description: A small programmable storage unit.

items.name: Storage
items.description: A programmable storage unit.

items.name: Mini Gate
items.description: Establish your own stargate by connecting two short range Small Gates together.

items.name: Network Node
items.description:
Establish your base with a Network Node. Stabilizes and fuels other structures in its range. Must be placed at an unclaimed Anchor point.

Once built you can set it as a home base.

items.name: Shelter
items.description: A hangar for ship sizes up to and including frigates.

items.name: Heavy Shelter
items.description: A large hangar for ship sizes up to and including battlecruisers.

items.name: Monolith 1
items.description: A decorative structure.

items.name: Monolith 2
items.description: A decorative structure.

items.name: Wall 1
items.description: A large structure used to create a physical obstacle for defensive purposes.

items.name: Wall 2
items.description: A large structure used to create a physical obstacle for defensive purposes.

items.name: Troilite Sulfide Grains
items.description:
Iron sulfide mineral characteristic of primitive carbonaceous asteroids. 

Hydrated Sulfide Matrix is a common source of Troilite Sulfide Grains.

items.name: Feldspar Crystal Shards
items.description:
Fractured aluminum tectosilicate minerals common in rocky and differentiated asteroids, typically formed through magmatic cooling processes.

Feldspar Crystal Shards are commonly refined from Feldspar Crystals.

items.name: D2 Fuel
items.description: Even the most mundane matter can be improved through synthesis with byproducts of Crude extraction. Plentiful and inefficient on the Frontier, hydrogen too may be uplifted through this process, breathing new life into reactors which would otherwise be left behind. A question remains: are these efforts efficient?

items.name: D1 Fuel
items.description: The allure of Crude Matter brought computation and humanity to the Frontier. As life reawakens, so too does the thirst for power in all its forms, including from the most mundane sources. Even in the face of the Static Shear, ice still litters the heavens. From its crystals, hydrogen may be extracted, reprocessed, and refined into fuel. This product, inefficient as it is, still drives the smallest vessels of the Frontier via its abundance and minimal cost.

items.name: Thermal Composites
items.description: Layered ceramics and metals that results in heat resistant manufacturing material.

items.name: Mummified Clone
items.description: An air of reverence lingers around this corpse. Marks of age and violence cannot fully conceal the care given to this body, long abandoned by its original owner. The time for remembrance, however, has passed.

items.name: Echo Chamber
items.description: Strong material for products requiring lower weight. ( copy )

items.name: Chitinous Organics
items.description:
Carbon-based polymer residues structurally analogous to chitin, indicative of complex prebiotic or biologically processed compounds.

Aromatic Carbon Veins, Methane Ice Shards, Primitive Kerogen Matrix and Tholin Nodules are a common source of Chitinous Organics.

items.name: Aromatic Carbon Weave
items.description:
Polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons formed by radiation processing of carbon-rich ices. 

Aromatic Carbon Veins is a common source of Aromatic Carbon Weave.

items.name: Kerogen Tar
items.description:
Complex organic polymer preserved from the early solar system. 

Kerogen Tar is commonly refined from Primitive Kerogen Matrix.

items.name: Batched Printed Circuits
items.description: Cheap and modular basic electronics computing system. ( copy )

items.name: Packaged Printed Circuits
items.description: Cheap and modular basic electronics computing system. ( copy )

items.name: Batched Carbon Weave
items.description: Strong material for products requiring lower weight. ( copy )

items.name: Packaged Carbon Weave
items.description: Strong material for products requiring lower weight. ( copy )

items.name: Batched Thermal Composites
items.description: Layered ceramics and metals that results in heat resistant manufacturing material. ( copy )

items.name: Packaged Thermal Composites
items.description: Layered ceramics and metals that results in heat resistant manufacturing material. ( copy )

items.name: Heat Exchanger XS
items.description: Increases the rate at which internal temperature reaches equilibrium with external temperature

items.name: Heat Exchanger S
items.description: Increases the rate at which internal temperature reaches equilibrium with external temperature

items.name: Hydrocarbon Residue
items.description:
Complex organic compounds formed from carbonaceous ices and dust. 

Tholin Nodules and Aromatic Carbon Veins are common sources of Hydrocarbon Residue.

items.name: Silica Grains
items.description:
Silicon dioxide grains that dominate many stony asteroid crusts. 

Silica Grains is commonly refined from Feldspar Crystals.

items.name: Iron-Rich Nodules
items.description:
Most common structural metal in asteroids. 

Platinum-Palladium Matrix is a common source of Iron-Rich Nodules.

items.name: SEER I
items.description: Sate the hunger for the arcane. This monolith resonates with long-forgotten knowledge.

items.name: SEER II
items.description: Sate the hunger for the arcane. This monolith resonates with long-forgotten knowledge.

items.name: HARBINGER I
items.description: Gnaw on the bones of the lost world. Monuments like this one have once sat at the eyes of the Feral storms.

items.name: HARBINGER II
items.description: Gnaw on the bones of the lost world. Monuments like this one have once sat at the eyes of the Feral storms.

items.name: RAINMAKER II
items.description: Follow the slipstream towards the source of world's blood. This sculpture is imprinted with Frontier's primal forces.

items.name: RAINMAKER I
items.description: Follow the slipstream towards the source of world's blood. This sculpture is imprinted with Frontier's primal forces.

items.name: Defiled Crude Matter
items.description:
Human greed carves gashes into the surface. Past sins bind to the structures within, transforming the promised bounty into a twisted relic. It enters this universe broken and scarred, carrying only a fraction of its potential.

Yet it is still Crude. It can still rouse dreams thought long extinct. Perhaps even the accursed dream responsible for its creation.

items.name: Relay
items.description: Establishes a connection to EVE Net, allowing the purchase of data, thus enabling the fabrication Crude mining lenses, as well as the sale of feral data.

items.name: Hop
items.description:
A transit module for covering ground. Once engaged, the vessel holds its heading and is carried forward until the burn completes. An ancient choice for hopping between adjacent points of interest.

Among the oldest schemata found in the Frontier. It is simulated that countless variants have descended from a theorised original pattern, each adapted to different hulls and purposes, yet the core principle remains unchanged. The first makers understood something fundamental about motion that later work has only decorated.

items.name: Stride
items.description:
A frame stripped for range, built to leap between stars.
The design bears apparent alterations — conduits rerouted through spaces that seem improvised, geometries bent into configurations that defy intuition.
No signature remains to mark its maker.

items.name: Carom
items.description: A hull shaped for distance and solitude. The proportions are spare, stripped of anything not essential to the crossing. The drive assembly carries unexpected mass — bracing layered over bracing, housings reinforced beyond apparent need, structure filling spaces the original geometry left hollow. What necessity shaped these adaptations remains unclear.

items.name: Redundant Module
items.description: A fragment of endless growth, stripped of purpose yet stubbornly persistent.

items.name: Void Residue
items.description: A lingering trace of chaotic growth, the remnants of energy that once fueled a self-propagating anomaly.

items.name: Singularity Reactor Fragment
items.description: Small but potent, it pulses with the force that drives endless growth.

items.name: Void fragments
items.description: Shards born from the collapse of unstable matter, whispering of relentless expansion and unseen forces.

items.name: Char
items.description: Charred remnants of volcanic crust, these fire-scarred asteroids contain crystalline feldspar minerals forged in the intense heat of differentiated parent bodies. Their burnt, weathered surfaces hide valuable aluminum and silicon-rich crystals beneath layers of space-weathered rock. Char asteroids are a common source of Feldspar Crystals and can typically be found in Inner Belts.

items.name: Slag
items.description: Industrial waste from the cosmos—metallic slag asteroids are the leftover cores of shattered worlds. Rich in platinum and palladium, these slowly-cooled metallic matrices represent the most precious remnants of planetary formation, concentrated in dense nickel-rich grains. Slag asteroids are a common source of Platinum-Palladium Matrix and can typically be found in Inner Belts.

items.name: Ingot
items.description: Pure metallic ingots drifting through space, these asteroids are nature's own refined metal bars. Containing the densest materials known—iridium, osmium, and ruthenium—they're the treasure vaults of the asteroid belt, forged in the deepest, hottest cores of primordial worlds. Ingot asteroids are a common source of Iridosmine Nodules.

items.name: Comet
items.description: Primitive water-bearers from stellar formation, these comet-like asteroids hold preserved secrets in their hydrated sulfide cores. Part ice, part metal, they're time capsules of aqueous chemistry now frozen in the void. Comet asteroids are a common source of Hydrated Sulfide Matrix and can typically be found in Outer Belts.

items.name: Dewdrop
items.description: Delicate spheres of frozen volatiles, dewdrop asteroids glisten with crystalline methane ice preserved at near-absolute-zero temperatures. These fragile outer belt wanderers are reservoirs of pure cryogenic fuel, waiting to be harvested from the cold reaches of space. Dewdrop asteroids are a common source of Methane Ice Shards.

items.name: Ember
items.description: Still glowing with primordial organic heat, ember asteroids contain pristine kerogen—complex carbon polymers that have remained unaltered since formation. These dark, coal-like bodies hold valuable chemical building blocks. Ember asteroids are a common source of Primitive Kerogen Matrix.

items.name: Glint
items.description: Shimmering with rainbow-like iridescence, glint asteroids sparkle with veins of complex aromatic hydrocarbons. Radiation-forged through extended exposure, their surfaces gleam with polycyclic organic compounds—the cosmic equivalent of liquid crystal displays, beautiful and chemically exotic. Glint asteroids are a common source of Aromatic Hydrocarbon Veins.

items.name: Soot
items.description: Dark as coal dust and deeply primordial, soot asteroids are coated in prebiotic tholin nodules—tar-like organic compounds formed through radiation chemistry. These sooty spheres are laboratories of cosmic chemistry, their surfaces slowly processing in the radiation of deep space. Soot asteroids are a common source of Tholin Nodules.

items.name: Field Storage
items.description: A small storage unit to store your resources.

items.name: Nest
items.description: A facility for storing Shells and transferring between them.

items.name: Calamitous Marrow
items.description: Chaos permeates the Frontier at all scales, converting stabilizing forces into agents of transformation. The evolutionary havoc pulsing through the trabeculae of this substance tantalizes with the possibilities it may unlock. Its desirable qualities, in turn, ensure its rarity, for the conditions which lead to its creation are impossible to replicate.

items.name: Nursery
items.description: A facility for growing synthetic Shells.

items.name: Lens 9001X
items.description: For use with Crude Extractors only.

items.name: Nursery
items.description: A facility for growing synthetic Shells.

items.name: Nest
items.description: A facility for storing Shells an transferring between them.

items.name: Mini Turret
items.description: A small base defence turret. Especially effective against smaller targets.

items.name: Mini Turret
items.description: A small base defence turret. Especially effective against smaller targets.

items.name: Skip
items.description:
A transit module for covering ground. Once engaged, the vessel holds its heading and is carried forward until the burn completes. An ancient choice for hopping between adjacent points of interest.

Among the oldest schemata found in the Frontier. It is simulated that countless variants have descended from a theorised original pattern, each adapted to different hulls and purposes, yet the core principle remains unchanged. The first makers understood something fundamental about motion that later work has only decorated. ( copy )

items.name: Lunge
items.description:
A transit module for covering ground. Once engaged, the vessel holds its heading and is carried forward until the burn completes. An ancient choice for hopping between adjacent points of interest.

Among the oldest schemata found in the Frontier. It is simulated that countless variants have descended from a theorised original pattern, each adapted to different hulls and purposes, yet the core principle remains unchanged. The first makers understood something fundamental about motion that later work has only decorated. ( copy )

items.name: Fine Young Crude Matter
items.description:
Tight weaves of energetic currents tangle and dissipate beneath the surface. Deeper, they merge so seamlessly as to appear singular in nature, concealing the true chaos seething within. The hue surrounding the matter subtly reflects this hidden truth, oscillating wildly between wave forms.

It is chaos which offers potential, enticing all who might stumble upon its power. So tempting is the possibility that risks may be easily ignored.

items.name: Turret
items.description: A medium base defence turret. Especially effective against mid sized ships.

items.name: Heavy Turret
items.description: A large base defence turret. Especially effective against larger ships.

items.name: Turret
items.description: A medium base defence turret. Especially effective against mid sized ships.

items.name: Heavy Turret
items.description: A large base defence turret. Especially effective against larger ships.

items.name: Fine Old Crude Matter
items.description:
Dense braids of tranquil, potent energy dance across the surface. Within, they ply together as if seeking to become one. From this unmet desire, the fuel of dreams might be extracted, as practiced by those long passed.

The ethereal beauty of transience emanates from compacting, ever-shifting weaves of sinew. Appreciation goes beyond immediate need and can therefore be discarded.

items.name: Leap
items.description:
A transit module for covering ground. Once engaged, the vessel holds its heading and is carried forward until the burn completes. An ancient choice for hopping between adjacent points of interest.

Among the oldest schemata found in the Frontier. It is simulated that countless variants have descended from a theorised original pattern, each adapted to different hulls and purposes, yet the core principle remains unchanged. The first makers understood something fundamental about motion that later work has only decorated. ( copy ) ( copy )

items.name: Still Kernel
items.description: ( copy )

items.name: Field Cairn
items.description:
A Field Cairn is deployable anchor that fixes a signature to an exact point in space for those intending to return.

Cairns lack stabilizing thrusters and are inherently unstable, gradually degrading and drifting out of orbit within 24 hours.

items.name: Field Cairn

Cairns lack stabilizing thrusters and are inherently unstable, gradually degrading and drifting out of orbit within 24 hours.

items.name: Palladium
items.description:
A rare platinum-group metal used in high-grade alloys and electronics.

Platinum-Palladium Matrix is a common source of Palladium.
